title: Bring My Dyes Back!
description: Re-Adds the old pre 25w31a Dye Textures because the new ones are bad
body:
Restore the beloved pre-25w31a dye textures to Minecraft. Experience the classic dye textures that were cherished by many players, providing a nostalgic return to familiar aesthetics. This resource pack aims to reintroduce these textures, addressing community feedback on the newer designs.



Reverts dye textures to their pre-1.21.9 versions.
Enhances player immersion with familiar visual elements.
